nasb.text: It is He who sits above the circle of the earth, And its inhabitants are like grasshoppers, Who stretches out the heavens like a curtain And spreads them out like a tent to dwell in.

esv.text: It is he who sits above the circle of the earth, and its inhabitants are like grasshoppers; who stretches out the heavens like a curtain, and spreads them like a tent to dwell in;

cnv.text: 神坐在大地的圓穹之上， 地上的居民好像蚱蜢， 他鋪張諸天如鋪張幔子， 展開眾天像展開可以居住的帳棚。

ccb.text: 上帝的宝座设立在大地的圆圈之上， 地上的人类好像蚱蜢。 祂铺展诸天，就像铺展幔子、铺展人居住的帐篷。

csbs.text: 神坐在大地的圆穹之上， 地上的居民好像蚱蜢。 他展开诸天如幔子， 铺张穹苍如居住的帐篷。
